productContent.fullTitle: Nike G.T. Cut Basketball Shoes
productContent.title: Nike G.T. Cut
productContent.subtitle: Basketball Shoes
productContent.descriptionHeading: CREATE YOUR SPACE. CHANGE THE GAME.
productContent.description:
CREATE YOUR SPACE. CHANGE THE GAME.


The Nike Air Zoom G.T. Cut is made for the space makers—the players who use their skills to create space for themselves and others. This lightweight, low-to-the-ground silhouette is built to minimize ground contact for the hardwood, giving you a sense of total control and lateral stability. It also comes equipped with a full React drop-in sole stacked on top of a parabolic Air Zoom Strobel and Zoom Air unit in the heel, providing a snappy, responsive feel.


Respond and React

A full React drop-in sole paired with a parabolic Air Zoom Strobel cushioning stacked with a Zoom Air unit in the heel helps provide the responsiveness you need to create space and opportunity off the dribble.


Creative Control

A thin, layered sole is sculpted to provide edge-to-edge traction and help minimize ground contact for a sensation of total control. This shoe is for players who can create space to score on offense or reclaim space with intensity on the defensive end.


Comfortable in Space

A low-to-the-ground design built with reinforced lightweight, layered mesh provides containment and optimal lateral stability. It also has a plush interior—making it ideal for players who want to feel quick without sacrificing comfort or control.


More Benefits

  • A stiff clip around the heel helps lock your foot in over the cushioning.
  • React foam heel wedge adds responsive comfort.

Product Details

  • Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)

productContent.fullTitle: Ja 3 "Explorer" Big Kids' Basketball Shoes
productContent.title: Ja 3 "Explorer"
productContent.subtitle: Big Kids' Basketball Shoes
productContent.description:
Every time Ja steps on the court, it's showtime. To help him elevate his game, we worked with him to make the bounciest Ja signature shoe so far. The Ja 3 is light, tough and a game-changer with full-length Hybrid ZoomX foam. “ZoomX is crazy responsive,” Ja says. “I call it that jet fuel.” We call it bad news for his defenders.


Must See

Oh Ja’s playing? Time to lock-in. “Showstopper” is inspired by his box office, supreme talent because it’s like that when 12 takes the court.


More Zoom. More Boom.

Full-length Hybrid ZoomX foam gives Ja Nike's highest energy return. "It's that extra boost when I'm already moving fast," Ja says.


Put Them on Notice

Ja knows the Ja 3's tuned, zoned outsole gives him an edge. "With this grip I can break defenders off any time I want," Ja says. The traction pattern features allover mini Ja logos, so he can cook his opponents and leave his stamp on the game.


Built Tough for 12

The lightweight, durable upper provides a canvas for Ja's unique style of play and the stability he needs to feel shifty.


What's New?

"The Ja 2 was about control—locking in," Ja says. "The Ja 3? It's freedom. More bounce, more energy, more movement." The combination of the full-length Hybrid ZoomX foam and the traction pattern helps Ja raise his game.


Ja Dropping Design

When Ja sat down with our designers, his message was clear. "I told 'em, 'Don't be scared. Push it,'" Ja says. The result? The Ja Swoosh logo—a vertical Swoosh logo next to a graffiti-sprayed "A"—and grimy scratch marks make a groundbreaker that's ready for the bright lights.


More Benefits

  • Foam sockliner on top of full-length Hybrid ZoomX foam has Ja feeling like he's on clouds with every move.
  • Padded collar adds cushioning.

Product Details

  • Classic laces
  • Low-cut collar

Stretchy fabric on the footbed gives the nodes room to move while still feeling soft against your foot.

Developed in Nike's Mind Science Department, 22 nodes move up and down against your foot in a way that is scientifically shown to activate sensory areas of the brain. Soft foam in the midsole provides robust, comfortable cushioning. The knit upper features engineered perforations for breathability. Stretchy fabric on the footbed gives the nodes room to move while still feeling soft against your foot.

productContent.fullTitle: Nike G.T. Cut 4 "Kay Yow" PER Basketball Shoes
productContent.title: Nike G.T. Cut 4 "Kay Yow" PER
productContent.subtitle: Basketball Shoes
productContent.description:
Basketball isn’t slowing down. The tempo, the pace, the players keep pushing the speed barrier to another dimension. Keep your game on go in the G.T. Cut 4. From full-length springy Air Zoom Strobel to a feathery ZoomX drop-in midsole to the cutting-edge upper, this mold-breaker combines our best basketball technologies for the alpha space makers who refuse to settle for anything but winning. This special all-pink design honors Kay Yow, who passed away from cancer in 2009, but inspires us all to continue to fight to find a cure.


Bouncy Steps

Your foot sits on top of a full-length, drop-in ZoomX 3.0 foam midsole, our lightest and most responsive foam. It gives you bounce with every stride and step.


Unreal Acceleration

Beneath the ZoomX midsole sits full-length Air Zoom Strobel cushioning that can help adds an unreal amount of acceleration and court feel to your game. An RBR-X stabilizer fuses a lightweight fabric into the forefoot of the ZoomX drop-in, which functions as a stabilizer to help you cut quicker. Supporting the trio of super power technologies is a Cushlon carrier that offers stability.


Court Feel

The under-the-hood trifecta offers our optimal responsiveness with the kind of court feel that players love both on and off the ball. It’s low, light and crazy agile.


Futuristic Upper

The sleek exoskeleton upper sports a futuristic, yet attested aesthetic that’s both rooted in Nike Basketball lore and asking to push the limits of the game. The pinky toe side of the upper sports synthetic material while the big toe side is made of a lightweight textile.


Accelerate and Decelerate

A generative traction outsole is specifically designed with acceleration and deceleration in mind when cutting and changing directions.


Lock In

A 3D molded collar offers optimal heel lockdown.

A snappy bottom-loaded Air Zoom unit in the forefoot gives your first step even more juice when attacking the hoop. As a nod to A’ja’s signature asymmetry, we added paneled ventilation to one side of the shoe for when the game heats up. If you’re ready to keep pace with the M’VP, go full force with soft cushioning that combines with powerful Air Zoom in an encore with extra oomph.

productContent.description:
Book’s quiet confidence comes both from within and the work he puts in. He would prefer to let his game and the Book 2 talk for him. Armed with game-ready tech, it’s more responsive than Book’s original masterpiece. Forefoot Air Zoom gives his first step a turbo boost. Player-approved Cushlon offers coast-to-coast cushion. And a super-charged sockliner gives Book soft, responsive step-in bounce. Ball in.


FRGMT Stamped

Once an envied urban legend seen only on timelines and algorithms the much-anticipated, highly coveted Book 2 x FRGMT collaboration is ready to drop. This design comes complete with the iconic double lightning bolt, stitched down leather Swoosh logos and an embroiled tongue logo that stamp this once in a lifetime collab between the two giants.


Zoom Zoom

We moved the Air Zoom unit from the heel to the forefoot for low profile responsiveness.


Snug Fit

A midfoot webbing system offers snug, soft security for quick cuts and sudden Book-like jabs and pivots.


Lightweight Upper

The upper is made of a light, durable synthetic material that disappears on your foot. It helps keep you and Book feeling fresh through the fourth quarter and beyond.


Cushy Foam

The midsole is made of our newest Cushlon foam, which gives you a plush underfoot sensation, so your feet feel fresh throughout the 4th quarter.


AF1-inspired Traction

The modernized herringbone traction pattern was inspired by Book’s love for the Air Force 1, taking its cues from heritage hoops pivot circles that delivers traction and durability.


More Benefits

  • Book’s foot sits on top of a responsive sockliner, offering the star a fast step-in feel.
  • A midfoot webbing system offers snug, soft security for quick cuts and sudden Book-like jabs and pivots.

Product Details

  • Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)

content.text: "The Decision” was a seminal moment in LeBron’s career, eventually leading to the ultimate goal—a title. Gold hits throughout speak to that captured prize. The upper pattern comes equipped with split-in-half crowns, the symbol of a King undecided. The pink tones are a subtle nod to the red-and-white plaid button down LeBron wore while announcing his intentions to take his talents to South Beach. We raised the stakes even higher by removing the tongue and implementing a full Flyknit cuff.

LeBron’s carried the game for two decades. But what if we could help lighten the load? Enter the LeBron XXIII. It offers peak lightweight responsiveness thanks to springy, full-length ZoomX foam—perfect for the high speed demands of the modern game — and a crown-shaped containment system to help you stay locked in. This LeBron XXIII is inspired by the much debated but never imitated "Decision" and ups the performance level to a peak level for hoopers all over.

productContent.fullTitle: LeBron XXIII "Good Intentions" Big Kids' Basketball Shoe
productContent.title: LeBron XXIII "Good Intentions"
productContent.subtitle: Big Kids' Basketball Shoe
productContent.description:
LeBron’s carried the game for two decades. But what if we could help lighten the load? Enter the LeBron XXIII. It offers lightweight responsiveness thanks to springy, full-length ReactX 3.0 foam—perfect for the high speed demands of the modern game. This LeBron XXIII is inspired by the much debated but never imitated "Decision" and ups the performance level to a peak level for hoopers all over.


Right Decision

Regardless of opinions, it’s inarguable “The Decision” led LeBron to the ultimate goal—a title. Gold accents speak to that captured prize. The upper pattern comes equipped with split-in-half crowns, playing into Bron's mindset prior to linking with Miami. The pink tones speak to the red-and-white plaid button down LeBron wore while announcing his intentions to take his talents to South Beach. And we elevated the performance to LeBron’s level by implementing a full-length Flyknit bootie. The laces come with gold metal lace tips.


Unreal Bounce

Lightweight and full of our best basketball tech, the LeBron XXIII is here to cushion your every move. Full-length ReactX 3.0 foam offers just the right amount of cushion and bounce, while a supportive plate helps keep you stable and fast on your feet.


Stay Sturdy

Whether on offense or defense, the unique upper is firm yet flexible, helping you stay locked in when on the court.


Light Work

The LeBron XXIII is engineered to be as lightweight as it is luxurious. We kept our materials featherweight without sacrificing a premium feel, so you can get to your spots and keep your cuts razor sharp.


Quick Moves

A super-grippy, multi-directional traction pattern offers you regal court feel, so you can stay a step ahead of all pretenders to the throne.


Product Details

  • Classic laces
  • Jacquard woven upper
  • Foam cushioning

productContent.title: LeBron XXIII Elite "Good Intentions"
productContent.subtitle: Basketball Shoes
productContent.description:
LeBron’s carried the game for two decades. But what if we could help lighten the load? Enter the LeBron XXIII. It offers peak lightweight responsiveness thanks to springy, full-length ZoomX foam—perfect for the high speed demands of the modern game — and a crown-shaped containment system to help you stay locked in. This LeBron XXIII is inspired by the much debated but never imitated "Decision" and ups the performance level to a peak level for hoopers all over.


Right Decision

"The Decision” was a seminal moment in LeBron’s career, eventually leading to the ultimate goal—a title. Gold hits throughout speak to that captured prize. The upper pattern comes equipped with split-in-half crowns, the symbol of a King undecided. The pink tones are a subtle nod to the red-and-white plaid button down LeBron wore while announcing his intentions to take his talents to South Beach. We raised the stakes even higher by removing the tongue and implementing a full-length Flyknit upper.


Unreal Bounce

The LeBron XXIII offers ultimate lightweight responsiveness thanks to some of our best basketball technology. A full-length ZoomX drop-in midsole offers optimal bounce. And, a carbon fiber plate helps keep your foot stable when making sudden movements while helping add a bit of speed.


Stay Sturdy

Whether attacking the paint or applying perimeter pressure, the innovative crown-shaped containment system will help you stay locked in.


Light Work

With an engineered jacquard and premium bootie lining, the LeBron XXIII is the ultimate in lightweight luxury, so you can get to your spots and keep your cuts razor sharp.


Quick Moves

A sticky, squeaky multi-directional traction pattern offers you regal court feel, you’ll stay a step ahead of all pretenders to the throne.

content.text: The benefits of Nike Mind technology in a comfortable, go-anywhere sneaker? Yeah, we did that. Plush and responsive foam cushions your every step while large outsole nodes push against your foot, engaging sensory areas of the brain to help you stay present and connect with your surroundings everywhere you go.

Developed in Nike's Mind Science Department, 22 nodes move up and down against your foot in a way that is scientifically shown to activate sensory areas of the brain. Soft foam in the midsole provides robust, comfortable cushioning. The knit upper features engineered perforations for breathability. Stretchy fabric on the footbed gives the nodes room to move while still feeling soft against your foot.

productContent.description:
The Air Max 95 originally takes inspiration from the human anatomy, leading to its distinctive wavy design. This version pairs mixed materials and visible Max Air cushioning for a layered look with unbelievable comfort.


Benefits

  • Upper draws inspiration from the human body—the midsole represents the spine, graduated panels are the muscles and the laces are the shoe’s ribs.
  • Textile and synthetic leather create a layered look built to last.
  • Visible Max Air cushioning provides lightweight cushioning.
  • Flex grooves in the midsole/outsole let you move freely.

Product Details

  • Foam midsole
  • Rubber outsole
  • Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)
